record.field: ['&', '&', '&', '&', ('business_category_id.code', '=', 'contract.income'), ('state', 'in', ['confirmed', 'running']), ('subject', 'not ilike', '结算'), ('subject', 'not ilike', '报告'), ('subject', 'not ilike', '审核')]

delete.search: [('name', 'in', ['资金驾驶舱', '成本驾驶舱']), ('parent_id', '=', ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_projection_root')), ('id', 'not in', [ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_dashboard_fund_cockpit_fact'), ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_dashboard_cost_cockpit_fact')])]

[('name', 'in', ['劳务计划', '劳务申请', '考勤记录', '劳务结算']), ('parent_id', '=', ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_labor_management_group')), ('id', 'not in', [ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_labor_plan'), ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_labor_request'), ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_attendance_checkin'), ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_labor_settlement')])]

[('name', 'in', ['设备计划', '设备申请', '设备使用登记', '设备结算']), ('parent_id', '=', ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_equipment_management_group')), ('id', 'not in', [ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_equipment_plan'), ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_equipment_request'), ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_equipment_usage'), ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_equipment_settlement')])]

[('name', 'in', ['分包计划', '分包申请', '分包登记', '分包结算']), ('parent_id', '=', ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_subcontract_management_group')), ('id', 'not in', [ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_subcontract_plan'), ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_subcontract_request'), ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_subcontract_register'), ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_subcontract_settlement')])]

[('name', 'in', ['质量检查', '质量整改', '质量复验', '安全检查', '安全整改', '安全复验']), ('parent_id', '=', ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_construction_management_center')), ('id', 'not in', [ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_quality_issue'), ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_quality_rectification'), ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_quality_recheck'), ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_safety_issue'), ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_safety_rectification'), ref('smart_construction_core.menu_sc_safety_recheck')])]
